It’s a warning shot to bloated teams moving too slow.

Here’s a fun prompt for you to make character sticker set from your photos

I used my pfp but works great on selfies as well 

prompt 👇 https://t.co/XquYnuo5Z1

Prompt: Create a premium 3d cartoon-style 3D character sticker set that is clearly recognizable as the same person. Use the uploaded image as the ONLY facial reference.
Output Requirements:
3×3 grid layout (9 stickers total)
Final aspect ratio: 4:5
Ultra high resolution (8K)
